final:
module top_module( 
input [3:0] Data1 , 
input [3:0] Data2 ,
output reg [3:0] SubOut ) ;always @ (*) 
	SubOut <= (Data1 - Data2) ;  always @(*) begin
    if (1'b0) begin
      if (Data1 == Data2) begin
        SubOut <= 4'b0;
      end else begin
        SubOut <= 4'b1;
      end;
    end
  end

endmodule
